revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Inline block]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Inline block]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Inline block]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 4541 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: <includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
<includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly><{{{2|span}}} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} <!-- -->style="<!-- -->{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} <!-- -->{{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} <!-- Allows gradients etc. too, as well as block colour. -->{{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} <!-- -->display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTInline block]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTnline block]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly><{{{2|span}}} {{#if:{{{title|}}} |title="{{{title}}}" }} style="{{#if:{{{width|}}} |width:{{{width}}}; }} {{#if:{{{height|}}} |height:{{{height}}}; }} {{#if:{{{color|}}} |color:{{{color}}}; }} {{#if:{{{background|{{{bg|}}}}}}|background:{{{background|{{{bg}}}}}};}} {{#if:{{{style|}}} |{{{style}}}; }} display:inline-block;" {{#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"}}>{{{1|}}}</{{{2|span}}}></includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
